overall.description: A slow cinematic drone shot through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night, transitioning from a commercial district dominated by a massive geodesic dome to an industrial harbor area as rain begins to fall. The footage features neon-lit skyscrapers, elevated transit bridges, and massive digital billboards beneath a full moon, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics reminiscent of Final Fantasy VII Remake's Midgar.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial district with elevated highways and geodesic dome

agents.ego_description: slowly panning left across the cityscape, observing the illuminated architecture and massive dome structure

entered.detail: massive spherical structure with glass panels and red structural elements on top
multi-level highway structure with railings spanning across the scene
large illuminated advertisement with green neon text and character graphics
tall building with vertical orange neon light strips running up its facade
vertical digital display showing animated content on building side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dry cyberpunk city night with a clear view of a massive geodesic dome dominating the right side. The camera drifts slowly left, revealing elevated transit bridges and neon-lit skyscrapers beneath a full moon. The environment is devoid of pedestrians and vehicles, creating a serene but dystopian atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor district with shipping cranes and waterfront

events.description: rain begins to fall, creating visible streaks across the view and wet reflections on surfaces

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left through the rain, revealing the industrial harbor area with shipping cranes

entered.detail: large yellow construction cranes visible in the distance near the waterfront
body of water reflecting city lights at the edge of the industrial district

segments.scene_description: As rain begins to fall, the camera continues drifting left to reveal an industrial harbor area with large shipping cranes silhouetted against the night sky. The geodesic dome exits the frame to the right while the green billboard and elevated bridge shift toward the right edge. The rain adds atmospheric depth with visible streaks and wet surface reflections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dry, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape that gradually transitions into a rain-slicked industrial harbor. It begins with a slow drift to the left, showcasing a massive geodesic dome and elevated transit bridges beneath a clear night sky and a full moon. As the camera continues its lateral movement, the atmosphere shifts when rain begins to fall, introducing visible streaks and wet reflections across the dystopian architecture. The scene then opens up to reveal an industrial harbor area with large shipping cranes silhouetted against the dark sky, while the geodesic dome and green billboards gradually exit the frame to the right.
